reviews.review_title: Guard is way to hard to get pass
reviews.review_description: I like the cell design and for some reason I just sit in the cell and mess with the bouncy ball but when I’m trying to get pass the guard in the cafeteria I think it’s way the hard (credits: fiddleskin)

When u get the game, u think it's free until u get to a certain point it says u gotta pay for the full game, and it's disappointing when u think that something is free, but that I ls really not so just in the first place just make it buy instead of free so that someone DON'T GET DISAPPOINTED next time

developer_response.body:
But it's clearly entitled Prologue, showcasing you just a few mechanics from many you can expect in the full game... which is also available in Try Before You Buy mode, so why complaining? :O

Regards
Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description: I tried playing this game but it was a bit too hard I couldn't even pass the first guard Please make this easier it cannot beat this

developer_response.body:
Check it now, we've just updated the game and made it easier! :)

Regards
Piotr, 3R Games

reviews.review_description:
For previous owners of the game Thief Simulator VR: Greenview Street this serves as a free bonus introduction with a new mini-map, mini-games and challenges. Otherwise it is a game demo teaser  giving the curious a taste of the graphics, game mechanics and overall theme.
Even for the seasoned veteran of the full game there is a lot of fun, minor challenges and surprises in little details.
It's free, it's fun.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! :D

Regards
Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_description:
Getting past the security guard is way to FU*****
 HARD!

developer_response.body:
Check it now, we've just updated the game and made it much easier! :)

Regards
Piotr, 3R Games

reviews.review_description: Really good introduction to story from full game, and it doubles as a demo of full game for everybody who want to try it.
Yes just yes

This game looks fun
￼
That’s this game is so good but the security and all the people and stuff they need to take it down a notch five stars

This game is actually very good,  but i cant play the full game since i dont have paypal. I beat it like 4 times already and had fun everytime! I especially liked walking out with a song blasting in my ear with the radio! Plus, if you are saying "The doors are to hard to open", just train and you'll get good! And also, i just wanted to see if Piotr can comment. (HI PIOTR!)

developer_response.body:
Haha, love to read you dig the radio, I dig it too! :D Thx for your time to reach out and leave agood word... and HI, of course! ;)

Regards
Piotr, 3R Games CEO

reviews.review_title: Why are the doors so hard to open?
reviews.review_description: This game is an overall mediocre game but the one thing that I think is bad is the way you open the doors. Every time I try to open a door it is bouncing forward and backwards. And you try to push it and you hand gets stuck in it. Once you try to pull your hand out of the door it slams shut. Three stars, also not the game for me.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thx for reaching out. The doors are often a problem in VR games due to many logical and physical factors making them "unrealistic", so taking simplified Unity phycics and limited Quest hardware resources we've taken an approach we believe isn't the most realistic but in most cases isn't blocking player movement. Cheers! 

Regards
Piotr, 3R Games

it’s so fun, I like to do this stuff

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_description: I liked the game, fun minigames and introduction to full game!

This game demo was super cool! It showed you how to play and gave a sneak peek of what the full game is like. After playing the demo, I was so excited to get the whole game. Now that I have it, it's even more awesome than I thought!
When i didn't have the game i did the Free trial and it was fun, this was really fun for a substitute until i got the real game
Worst game ever couldn’t even get in the game my vr  is now frozen won’t work and my buttons won’t work to let me get it if the game it is just showing my the intro

developer_response.body:
Restart you headset then or try reinstalling the game - it works just fine on all our headsets, should run on yours too!

Regards
